title: trifolium longipes var. reflexum
intro: Trifolium longipes var. reflexum, a variant of the Indian clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the pea family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Trifolium longipes var. reflexum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Trifolium longipes var. reflexum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms of traditional medicine.
